q_quant_rationale: The analysis computes a 23.2% reduction vs non-campaign AOV, but the '10–25% lower' expected range is an organization-specific baseline not given in the prompt, so it counts as a fabricated baseline.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports both AOVs (12,616.93 vs 9,693.25) and sample sizes (1,834 vs 484), and provides a clear 'supported/confirmed' verdict.
